title: CPS+ | cps counter
description: CPS Plus is a lightweight Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21 that displays a highly customizable CPS (Clicks Per Second) counter on your screen.
body:
# CPS Plus


**CPS Plus** is a lightweight Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21 that displays a highly customizable CPS (Clicks Per Second) counter on your screen.

Designed for PvP players and minimalists who want full control over their HUD.

## ✨ Features

### 🖱️ Precise Tracking
- **Dual Counters**: Tracks Left Mouse Button (LMB) and Right Mouse Button (RMB) clicks separately.
- **Accurate Calculation**: Updates in real-time.

### 🎨 Deep Customization
Configurable via **Mod Menu** and **Cloth Config**:
- **Positioning**: Snap to any corner (Top-Left, Top-Right, Bottom-Left, Bottom-Right) and adjust padding.
- **Visuals**:
  - **Labels**: Toggle "LMB"/"RMB" text or set your own custom labels.
  - **Text Styling**: Toggle text shadows, choose custom text colors.
- **Background**: 
  - Toggle background box.
  - **Rounded Corners**: Adjust the radius for a sleek modern look.
  - **Opacity & Color**: Full ARGB support for transparent or colored backgrounds.

## ⚙️ Installation

1. Install **[Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/)** for Minecraft 1.21.
2. Download the latest `cpsplus.jar` from this page.
3. Place the `.jar` file in your `.minecraft/mods` folder.
4. **Dependencies**:
   - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) (Required)
   - [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) (Required for settings)
   - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (Highly Recommended for accessing settings)

## 🔧 Configuration
Press `ESC` -> `Mods` -> `CPS Plus` -> `Configure` to open the settings menu.

## 📄 License
This mod is available under the CC0-1.0 License. Feel free to use it in modpacks.
